description: P1 reference sections for the 'NACA generator matches published ordinates' gate criterion. Ground truth = the vendored UIUC-published coordinate files; the generator is compared to them by geometric point-to-curve distance (see backend/airfoils/metrics.py — y-at-x is invalid near the LE).
provenance: UIUC Airfoil Coordinate Database, https://m-selig.ae.illinois.edu/ads/coord/<name>.dat, vendored under data/uiuc_snapshot/.
threshold_rationale: max measured deviation across the 3 sections is 1.83e-4; threshold 5.0e-4 leaves ~2.7x margin while still catching a real regression. Lives in backend/tolerances.py::NACA_PUBLISHED_MATCH_MAX_DEV_FRAC.
generator_notes: NACA thickness uses the open-TE coefficient (-0.1015 x^4), matching UIUC's published NACA coordinates. 5-digit uses the standard non-reflex (m, k1) mean-line constants scaled linearly by design Cl.
